expected_answer: Ticket P1 tự động escalate lên Senior Engineer nếu không có phản hồi trong 10 phút sau khi tạo ticket.
faithfulness_notes: Token overlap answer/context = 0.82
relevance_notes: [LLM-Judge:openai/gpt-oss-120b] The answer directly explains how escalation occurs in a P1 incident, describing the automatic trigger, temporary permission handling, and logging, which aligns with the question.
